x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Reservation history is the primary dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI occupancy analysis and space utilization insights. Without sufficient reservation data, AI cannot identify utilization patterns or generate accurate space optimization recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); ga.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: count + " reservations in the last 12 months. Now Assist WSD has sufficient reservation history for AI occupancy analysis and space utilization insights." }; } else if (count >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " reservations in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis will have limited pattern data." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " reservations in the last 12 months. Insufficient reservation history for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all workplace reservations are captured in ServiceNow WSD. If volume is low due to recent implementation, allow reservation data to accumulate before expecting optimal AI performance.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c62
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Reservation history is the primary dataset Now Assist WSD uses for AI occupancy analysis and space utilization insights. Without sufficient reservation data, AI cannot identify utilization patterns or generate accurate space optimization recommendations.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Reservation Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var cutoff = new GlideDateTime(); cutoff.addYearsUTC(-1); var ga = new GlideAggregate("sn_wsd_rsv_reservation"); ga.addQuery("sys_created_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue()); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 500) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: count + " reservations in the last 12 months. Now Assist WSD has sufficient reservation history for AI occupancy analysis and space utilization insights." }; } else if (count >= 100) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " reservations in the last 12 months (target: 500+). Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis will have limited pattern data." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: count + " reservations in last 12 months", finding: "Only " + count + " reservations in the last 12 months. Insufficient reservation history for meaningful Now Assist WSD AI occupancy analysis." }; } })]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>WSD</module><number>CHK0000601</number><order>400</order><remediation_guidance>Ensure all workplace reservations are captured in ServiceNow WSD. If volume is low due to recent implementation, allow reservation data to accumulate before expecting optimal AI performance.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c62</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Reservation Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_1ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c62</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
